_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to conceptualize the entirety of the intelligence process in the multiple domains and dimensions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.539), OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.539).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.632). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [conceptualize, dimensions, domains, entirety, intelligence, multiple] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.873, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Skill to conceptualize the entirety of the intelligence process in the multiple" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.578 < STS 0.632 (gap -0.054). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [conceptualize, dimensions, domains] and [acquisition, ai, building] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [conceptualize, dimensions, domains, entirety, intelligence, multiple]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].
